items.title: Solana privacy layer Umbra launches confidential vesting with Streamflow targeting $97B token unlock market
items.whyYouShouldCare: Umbra's confidential vesting could attract significant interest in Solana's ecosystem, tapping into the $97 billion token unlock market and enhancing privacy features.

items.title: Solana: How SOL’s ETF boom pushed Jupiter Lend TVL above $2B
items.whyYouShouldCare: The surge in SOL's ETF popularity has contributed to Jupiter Lend's total value locked exceeding $2 billion, indicating strong liquidity and user engagement.

items.title: Ethereum Firm Sharplink, Solana Treasury Forward Industries Joining Russell 2000, 3000 Indexes
items.whyYouShouldCare: The inclusion of Sharplink and Solana Treasury Forward Industries in the Russell 2000 and 3000 indexes may enhance Solana's visibility and institutional interest.
